title: Keyboard shortcut handler for agent interactions
purpose: Provides a React hook that registers global keyboard shortcuts for agent actions like sending messages, canceling, focusing, and inserting mentions.
module_context: Exports a hook function 'useAgentShortcuts' with an interface 'UseAgentShortcutsOptions' defining available callbacks and an enabled flag.

steps.content: Set up a side effect to register keyboard event listeners when the component mounts.
IF the hook is disabled or running in an environment without window, do nothing.
Define a keyboard event handler that checks for specific key combinations and invokes corresponding callbacks.
Register the keyboard event handler on the window object.
Clean up by removing the keyboard event listener when the component unmounts.
Check if the Ctrl or Meta key is pressed along with Enter to trigger the send action.
IF the send callback is defined, prevent the default behavior and invoke the send callback.
Check if the Escape key is pressed to trigger the cancel action.
IF the cancel callback is defined, invoke the cancel callback.
Check if the Ctrl or Meta key is pressed along with 'k' or 'K' to trigger the focus action.
IF the focus callback is defined, prevent the default behavior and invoke the focus callback.
Check if the Ctrl or Meta key is pressed along with '/' to trigger the slash action.
IF the slash callback is defined, prevent the default behavior and invoke the slash callback.
Check if the Ctrl or Meta key is pressed along with '@' to trigger the mention action.
IF the mention callback is defined, prevent the default behavior and invoke the mention callback.
